EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME TO FILE NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (A) (TRANSACTION ID # 22525863) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOOSER, JAMES HOOSER, WILMA

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-02-2008 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 3/2/09 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET IN DEPT. 220. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL IDENTIFICATION AND LAY WITNESSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS THAT SUPPORT THEIR TESTIMONY, AS TO EACH INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT BY 1/2/09. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES AFTER THE DUE DATE THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT IDENTIFIED PREVIOUSLY. ALL DEFENDANTS SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL LAY WITNESSES THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT LEARNED OF THROUGH ITS OWN DISCOVERY EFFORTS AND THAT WILL SUPPORT PROPOSITION 51 PURPOSES OR FOR THEIR AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS UPON WHICH THESE WITNESSES SUPPORT, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 50 DAYS AFTER THE GRANTING OF PREFERENCE. IF DEFENDANTS LEARN OF NEW WITNESSES AND OR DOCUMENTS, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED PREVIOUSLY. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DONNA LOK; REPORTER: HELEN SOREP-MATLEY (206)
MASTER JURY ASBESTOS CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-02-2009 VACATED. PLAINTIFF JAMES HOOSER PASSED AWAY PER PLAINTIFF'S LETTER DATED 1/20/09. (206)
